title: polypodium digitatum
intro: Polypodium digitatum, also known as the finger fern, is a type of plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family of ferns. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polypodium digitatum include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Polypodium digitatum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
